query: SELECT id, subject, status, recipientCount, openedCount, section, scheduledAt, sentAt, createdAt, send_date FROM newsletter_sends WHERE subject LIKE '%Buonpomeriggio%' OR subject LIKE '%PPV%' OR subject LIKE '%ppv%' OR subject LIKE '%Verify%' OR subject LIKE '%17:30%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT id, subject, status, recipientCount, openedCount, section, scheduledAt, sentAt, createdAt, send_date FROM newsletter_sends WHERE subject LIKE '%Buonpomeriggio%' OR subject LIKE '%PPV%' OR subject LIKE '%ppv%' OR subject LIKE '%Verify%' OR subject LIKE '%17:30%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
